fsh-generated/resources/Bundle-GuidelineRecommendationExample.json Show Validation Information (59)

  • Bundle: Validated against this.Guideline Bundle
  • Bundle.entry[0].resource: Validated against this.Clinical Practice Guideline, fhir.Composition and this.Clinical Practice Guideline (per meta)
  • Bundle.entry[1].resource: Validated against this.Guideline Citation, this.Study Citation, this.Guideline Citation (per meta), this.Recommendation Citation and fhir.Citation
  • Bundle.entry[2].resource: Validated against this.Recommendation, this.Recommendation Plan, this.Recommendation (per meta) and fhir.PlanDefinition
  • Bundle.entry[3].resource: Validated against this.Recommendation, this.Recommendation Plan (per meta), this.Recommendation Plan and fhir.PlanDefinition
  • Bundle.entry[4].resource: Validated against this.Recommendation Action, this.Drug Administration Action (per meta) and fhir.ActivityDefinition
  • Bundle.entry[5].resource: Validated against this.PICO Evidence Variable, this.Recommendation Eligibility Criteria (per meta) and fhir.EvidenceVariable

ED_INVARIANT_EXPRESSION_CONFLICT

fsh-generated/resources/StructureDefinition-guideline-bundle.jsonThe constraint 'dom-3' has an expression 'contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()', which differs from the earlier expression provided of 'contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().ofType(canonical) | %resource.descendants().ofType(uri) | %resource.descendants().ofType(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(ofType(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(ofType(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()' (invariants are allowed to repeat, but cannot differ)
